license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x8afrse
title: iPSC gDNA Extraction: For Screening Edited Clones
author: Celeste M M. Karch

steps_raw.instruction: Spin 96 well PCR plate at 3800 rpm for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .
Pipet off supernatant. If worried about removing cells, transfer supernatant with multichannel pipet into new PCR plates and store at -20 °C until DNA extraction is complete.
To cell pellet (often not visible), add 50 µL QuickExtract DNA Solution ( Epicentre Technologies QE09050 ).
Incubate plate in thermocycler at 98 °C for 00:02:00 .
Place plate in -20 °C for storage, until ready to use for further screening experiments .
